📝 Auditor summary

Overall, this site scores 90/100 (Excellent). The audit found 3 verified findings: 0 critical, 2 warning, and 1 info/opportunity. The main items to address are Performance score needs improvement; Sitewide internal link coverage is weak; Entity SEO signals are incomplete. Recommended next move: Target the largest performance bottlenecks before the next release.

✅ Fix sequence

  1. Performance score needs improvementTarget the largest performance bottlenecks before the next release.
  2. Sitewide internal link coverage is weakImprove hub-to-detail linking and make sure key pages have both inbound and onward links.
  3. Entity SEO signals are incompleteStrengthen sameAs links and external knowledge-graph signals where relevant.

🚦 Critical Issues

Fix these first because they can block search visibility, indexing, or user experience.
